issue.message: Call requires API level 34 (current min is 33): `getDeduplicationGroup`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 33): `getDeduplicationId`
Call requires API level 34 (current min is 33): `android.content.pm.PackageManager#getPackageUidAsUser`

Method `RolesState()` is a flagged API and should be inside an `if (Flags.systemServerRoleControllerEnabled())` check (or annotate the surrounding method `writeFile` with `@FlaggedApi(Flags.FLAG_SYSTEM_SERVER_ROLE_CONTROLLER_ENABLED) to transfer requirement to caller`)

Method `getFallbackEnabledRoles()` is a flagged API and should be inside an `if (Flags.systemServerRoleControllerEnabled())` check (or annotate the surrounding method `readFile` with `@FlaggedApi(Flags.FLAG_SYSTEM_SERVER_ROLE_CONTROLLER_ENABLED) to transfer requirement to caller`)

Method `RolesState()` is a flagged API and should be inside an `if (Flags.systemServerRoleControllerEnabled())` check (or annotate the surrounding method `parseRoles` with `@FlaggedApi(Flags.FLAG_SYSTEM_SERVER_ROLE_CONTROLLER_ENABLED) to transfer requirement to caller`)
issue.errorLine1: return new RolesState(version, packagesHash, roles, fallbackEnabledRoles);

issue.message: Method `getFallbackEnabledRoles()` is a flagged API and should be inside an `if (Flags.systemServerRoleControllerEnabled())` check (or annotate the surrounding method `serializeRoles` with `@FlaggedApi(Flags.FLAG_SYSTEM_SERVER_ROLE_CONTROLLER_ENABLED) to transfer requirement to caller`)
